name: Tofu Enchiladas
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Mori-Nu Silken Firm Tofu (10.5 oz each), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine tofu, nutritional yeast "cheese," cilantro, onion, corn, and chili powder.
2. Heat enchilada sauce in a separate container.
3. Dip each tortilla quickly into the heated sauce and place it on a flat surface. Top with approximately 1/2 cup of the tofu mixture and roll tightly. Place seam side down in an 8-inch square shallow baking dish.
4. Pour remaining sauce over the enchiladas.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes in a preheated 350-degree oven.
6. Garnish with diced tomatoes and chopped green onion.
7. Serve hot.
Makes 6 enchiladas.
